description: We understand that pet owners love their animals and want the very best for them. There is a certain rapport that pet owners strive to reach with their vets and their pet groomers. They want to know that their dog or cat is in excellent hands when their ‘baby’ is dropped off for a grooming even if only for a couple of hours. Our professional dog groomer, Rogeria Santana ,instills that sense of trust in her customers. Loving and Care Pet Grooming is excited to have Rogeria Santana on board.This allows pet owners to take advantage of her 24 years experience. You’ll experience firsthand the love and passion she has for each and every pet and for the skills she has acquired to be the best at what she does.� Request a dog grooming today by calling: 914-619-6949

1. We understand that pet owners love their animals and want the very best for them. There is a certain rapport that pet owners strive to reach with their vets and their pet groomers. 2. Soooo I took my dog to this groomer on his bday and she called me to cut and get her..she also videoed climbing her and pulling the heck in the comb!! I was reluctant to pay..but I did!!! When she got in the car she was soooo withdraw..no response to her name and no eye contact..it was a sad bday ! We did all we could to cheer her up.. it's a day we will never forget. Oh and she sent me the video. Never everrrrr will I recommend this place. And to top it off this place has been around for a long time.
3. Juliet Dunn I never had your dog here
4. We have a warm heart for cold noses! * Nail clippings * Flea and Tick baths * Complete grooming

layoutDescription: Full-bleed hero photo with directional gradient overlay (not centered vignette); headline anchored bottom-left or bottom-right; strong contrast type; optional sticky mobile call bar.
mood: Friendly, caring, trustworthy — pets are family
antiPatterns: No menu section. No restaurant language. Soft or playful but not childish unless posts suggest it.
photoInventory: You will receive 12 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
